DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF WAN SONG'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT TO EXECUTE AUTHORIZATION FOR RELEASE OF CELL PHONE RECORDS IS DENIED. COURT HAS NO POWER TO COMPEL A PARTY TO SIGN A RELEASE OF CELL PHONE RECORDS. COURT NOTES THAT AN ISSUE (NOT BEFORE THE COURT ON THIS MOTION) REMAINS WHETHER CELL PHONE RECORDS ARE WITHIN "CONTROL" OF A PARTY IN THAT HE COULD READILY OBTAIN COPIES OF SAID RECORDS FROM HIS CELL PHONE PROVIDER IN RESPONSE TO A DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS UNDER CCP SEC. 2031.010 ET SEQ. THE PREVAILING IS TO SUBMIT THE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: CHARLES GEERHART. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY, 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT TOMMY FANG'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS IS DENIED. THE MODIFIED AUTHORIZATION ATTACHED TO THE PLAINTIFF'S PAPERS AS EXHIBIT 7 SUFFICIENTLY NARROWS THE SCOPE OF THE SUBPOENA AT ISSUE. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE WRITTEN ORDER, APPROVED AS TO FORM AND CONTENT, FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE PRO TEM NOAH LEBOWITZ, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (302).

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANTS TOMMY FANG, AND GO LORRIE'S AIRPORT SHUTTLE'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER TO LIMIT NUMBER OF PLAINTIFF'S DISCLOSED EXPERT WITNESSES HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS TOMMY FANG, AND GO LORRIE'S AIRPORT SHUTTLE'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER TO LIMIT NUMBER OF PLAINTIFF'S DISCLOSED EXPERT WITNESSES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS LIMITED TO THE TEN SPECIFIC NON-RETAINED EXPERTS LISTED IN HER SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING (MASAK, ARGAND, SAKAMOTO, MINDEA, VASUDEVAN, PARK, VALERIE LEE, WIN, EUGUENE LEE, AND ALEXANDER), WITH SANCTIONS AWARDED CONSISTING OF PAYING FOR THE COSTS OF THE DEPOSITIONS OF ANY EXPERT DEPOSITIONS DEFENDANT LORRIE CHOOSES TO TAKE BEYOND THE FIVE RETAINED EXPERTS AND THE FIRST FIVE NON-RETAINED EXPERTS. THE COSTS ARE LIMITED TO EXPERT FEES AND COURT REPORTER COSTS, NOT ATTORNEY'S FEES. THIS ORDER IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY ORDERS THE TRIAL JUDGE MAY MAKE REGARDING EXPERTS. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/EHG)

Defendants Tommy Fang, And Go Lorrie'S Airport Shuttle'S Motion For Protective Order To Limit Number Of Plaintiff'S Disclosed Expert Witnesses
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Monica Burneikis, of Meisel, Krentsa & Burneikis, Tel. 415.788.2035, for plaintiffs;
Martin L. Seeger, IV, of Babin & Seeger, LLP, Tel. 707.526.7370, for defendants Tommy Fang dba Go Lorries Airport Shuttle;
Veronika J. Zappelli, of Law Offices of Adrienne D. Cohen, Tel. 415.454.0500, for defendants Tommy Fang dba Go Lorries Airport Shuttle, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Tommy Fang, And Go Lorrie'S Airport Shuttle's Motion For Protective Order To Limit Number Of Plaintiff's Disclosed Expert Witnesses is granted. Plaintiff is limited to the ten specific non-retained experts listed in her supplemental briefing (Masak, Argand, Sakamoto, Mindea, Vasudevan, Park, Valerie Lee, Win, Euguene Lee, and Alexander), with sanctions awarded consisting of paying for the costs of the depositions of any expert depositions defendant Lorrie chooses to take beyond the five retained experts and the first five non-retained experts. The costs are limited to expert fees and court reporter costs, not attorney's fees. This Order is without prejudice to any orders the trial judge may make regarding experts. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Deft. Go Lorries Airport Shuttle'S Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Off Calendar

To Compel Defendant To Execute Authorization For Release Of Cell Phone Records
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Donald Krensta of Law Offices of Meisel & Krensta telephone number 415-788-2035 for Plaintiff.
Martin Seeger of Babin & Seeger, LLP telephone number 707-526-7370 appeared by telephone for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. Late opposition. The Court did not hear the matter because of late contest. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WAN SONG'S Motion To Compel Defendant To Execute Authorization For Release Of Cell Phone Records is denied. Court has no power to compel a party to sign a release of cell phone records. Court notes that an issue (not before the Court on this motion) remains whether cell phone records are within "control" of a party in that he could readily obtain copies of said records from his cell phone provider in response to a demand for production of documents under CCP sec. 2031.010 et seq. The prevailing is to submit the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT TOMMY FANG'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas IS DENIED. The modified authorization attached to the plaintiff's papers as Exhibit 7 sufficiently narrows the scope of the subpoena at issue.
